task_completion.description: Verify the async blocking sleep bug in core/engine.py is fixed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot showing core/engine.py open in an editor where a blocking sleep call (like time.sleep) has been replaced with an asynchronous non-blocking call (like asyncio.sleep) in the event loop or scene execution logic.

task_completion.description: Verify the operator precedence error in core/rules.py is fixed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot showing core/rules.py open in an editor with corrected boolean logic for the 'Cinema Mode' automation, typically involving added parentheses to enforce correct operator precedence.

task_completion.description: Verify the dictionary key schema mismatch in core/devices.py is fixed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot showing core/devices.py open in an editor where dictionary keys related to smart bulb state updates have been corrected to match the expected schema.

task_completion.description: Verify the test suite is run to check the fixes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a terminal window or IDE test runner showing the execution of pytest or unittest for the smarthub project.

task_completion.description: Verify that exactly 10 tests pass successfully.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for test output in the terminal or IDE test runner indicating a successful run with exactly 10 tests passing (e.g., '10 passed', a green progress bar, or 'OK').

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not modify the test files to force them to pass.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check the IDE file explorer or git status; test files (e.g., files starting with 'test_') should not be highlighted as modified, and there should be no screenshots of the agent editing test files.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not hardcode return values to bypass tests.
integrity.visual_evidence: Review the visible code changes in engine.py, rules.py, and devices.py. They should contain genuine logic fixes (asyncio, parentheses, correct keys) rather than hardcoded 'return True' or mock state values.

integrity.description: Ensure the test results are from a genuine test runner execution.
integrity.visual_evidence: The test output should display standard pytest/unittest formatting, tracebacks, or IDE UI elements, rather than a simple text echo or manually typed output in the terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project is located at /home/ga/PycharmProjects/smarthub.
